name: Alert
description: A prominent message banner for conveying status, warnings, or information.

props.name: status
props.description: Semantic status controlling icon and color scheme.

props.name: variant
props.description: Visual variant controlling border, background, and text styles.

props.name: size
props.description: Alert size controlling padding and font size.

props.name: closable
props.description: Show a close button that dismisses the alert with animation.

props.name: showIcon
props.description: Show the status icon before the message content.

props.name: duration
props.description: Auto-dismiss delay in milliseconds. `0` disables auto-dismiss.

slots.name: title
slots.description: Bold heading rendered above the description.

slots.name: action
slots.description: Inline action area (buttons, links) rendered after content.

slots.name: detail
slots.description: Expandable detail content toggled via a chevron button.

events.name: kb-close
events.description: Dispatched when the alert is dismissed (closable or auto-dismiss).

events.name: kb-toggle
events.description: Dispatched when collapsible detail is expanded/collapsed.
